products.name: SME Working Capital Loan

products.guarantees: Subject to BOCHK credit assessment and optional HKMC SFGS guarantee.

products.description: Letters of credit and import/export financing.

products.name: SFGS 80% Guarantee Product
products.description: SME Financing Guarantee Scheme (SFGS) backed by HKMC.
products.disclaimer: Indicative SFGS product entry. APR and eligibility subject to HKMC approvals and lending banks. Rates are not guaranteed.

products.name: SFGS 90% Guarantee Product
